title: Lightning Mqueen
description: This texture pack changes the classic Minecraft ship, and replaces it with a fun Lightning McQueen
body:
# Lightning Mqueen Boat
EN

You are fan of lightning mqueen?

This texture pack changes the classic Minecraft ship, and replaces it with a fun Lightning McQueen 3D of Cars, Disney.

The New Mqueen Skins is so cool.



  By @d_de_diego_d



WEB:

[https://tridex.webnode.es](https://tridex.webnode.es)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

ES

¿Eres fanático de Lightning Mqueen?

Este paquete de texturas cambia el barco clásico de Minecraft y lo reemplaza con un divertido Rayo McQueen 3D de Cars, Disney.

El nuevo Mqueen Skins es genial.



Optifine Requiered
